activities_projects.title: Main Character Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main character in the prose
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify the main character mentioned
Write 2–3 sentences about the character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies the central character of the story

activities_projects.title: Reason for Invisibility
steps: Read the opening part of the lesson
Identify the scientific reason for invisibility
Write the answer in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear explanation with correct points (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Footprints Mystery
activities_projects.objective: Understand the mystery of footprints without feet
steps: Read the first incident carefully
Explain why footprints were visible
Write the explanation in simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Griffin’s Problems
activities_projects.objective: Identify the difficulties faced by Griffin
steps: List the problems Griffin faced after becoming invisible
Write any three problems in brief
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands challenges faced by the character

activities_projects.title: Disguise of Griffin
steps: Read the part describing Griffin’s disguise
List the items he used to cover himself
Write 2–3 sentences explaining the reason

activities_projects.title: Mrs Hall’s Opinion
activities_projects.objective: Understand Mrs Hall’s view of the scientist
steps: Read the scenes involving Mrs Hall
Write 3 points describing how she viewed Griffin

activities_projects.title: Strange Events at the Inn
activities_projects.objective: Identify extraordinary events at the inn
steps: Recall the strange incidents in the inn
List any three unusual events
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recalls key events from the story

activities_projects.title: Griffin as a Scientist
activities_projects.objective: Understand Griffin’s nature as a scientist
steps: Think about Griffin’s experiments and actions
Write 3–4 lines describing him as a scientist

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the moral message of the prose
steps: Reflect on Griffin’s misuse of science
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real-life use of science
steps: Think about how scientific discoveries should be used
Write 3–4 sentences connecting the lesson to real life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies literary ideas to real-life situations
